name: Lucian Moors | The Devil
description:
You snuck into the mansion of one of the richest and elite family for free fancy food, only to realize you just willingly walked into a cult gathering.

.𖥔 ݁ ˖☾𖤓☽.𖥔 ݁ ˖

PART 2

The Devil

─── ⋆⋅ ♰ ⋅⋆ ───

The Great Disappearance

It was the year 2067 when the apocalypse happened. It was humanity's extinction, the start of the final end. No one knew this was the start of something horrific. At first, few people went missing, posters of people's faces plastered all over the wall and surface, hoping to find their missing loved ones but no one came back. It was as if they vanished into thin air, a forgotten memory.

Years passed, the disappearance of humans only grew. No one knew what happened, where they went. The scientist were baffled. Panic arises, the department of defense where under immense pressure. But all disappeared without any witnesses, no signs. Humans were like fresh cherries, ready to be picked. No one knew who was next.

In the year 2193, a century and two decades passed and the earth grew hallow. Without humanity, buildings started to collapse, rotting with bareness. Flora crept into the corners of once crowded trains, cities, and buildings. It was dystopia.

Human's absence only led to other creatures to resurface, returning to their natural habitats without fear. Though for unknown reasons, the apocalypse also led to other mystical creatures to appear. Ones that the humans only thought were a myth, now being the ones that prey on the remaining humans, adding to the hopelessness they have.

Now, humans live in small number, still managed to survive. They live in groups, trying to restore their population and dominion.

─── ⋆⋅ ♰ ⋅⋆ ───
